arched backward over ancient stone, spine curved deeply, throat to sky, water glistening down shoulders and collarbone
rising from dark pool, arms lifted overhead, head tilted back, water streaming off silhouette in moonlight
reclining in shallow tidepool, one knee raised, arms above head, body forming long sinuous S-curve through hips
leaning forward from moss-covered ledge, wet hair cascading down, gazing up through dark lashes with smoldering intensity
pressed back against waterfall stone, chin lifted high, cascading water flowing down shoulders and spine's arch
stretched on side in warm moss, propped on elbow, fingertips trailing slowly down her own waist
standing waist-deep in moonlit water, arms crossed behind head, every curve silhouetted against silver light
kneeling at pool's edge, leaning back, spine deeply arched, long hair dragging through water behind her
twisted to look over shoulder, spine forming serpentine curve, wet skin catching golden firelight and shadow
floating face-up in dark water, hair spreading like midnight halo, arms drifting wide in surrender
seated at hot spring edge, leaning back on hands, eyes closed, steam curling around silhouette
draped stomach-down over moss-covered boulder, chin resting on arms, watching with smoldering half-lidded eyes
emerging from surf, head thrown back, hands running through wet hair, water droplets caught on skin
perched on rock in waterfall mist, one leg drawn up, arms wrapped around knee, profile luminous
lying in rain-soaked grass, arms stretched overhead, back arched, face turned skyward receiving rainfall
standing beneath cascade, arms raised high, water coursing down the valley of her spine and hips
seated in shallow stream, knees drawn to side, torso twisted, looking back over curved shoulder
reclining against slick cave wall, one knee bent upward, fingertips grazing along her own neck
kneeling in tidal pool, spine arched backward, palms pressed to wet sand behind, throat exposed
rising on tiptoe in deep water, arms extended overhead in graceful V, body elongated and glistening
lying on side at water's edge, head pillowed on bent arm, free hand resting on the curve of hip
standing in morning mist, back to viewer, hands gathering wet hair off neck, spine's elegant line visible
draped across sunlit rock, stomach down, propped on forearms, ankles crossed, eyes heavy with languid heat
sitting in thermal spring, knees to chest, arms wrapped around shins, chin tilted up through rising steam
stretched along fallen log over water, belly down, one arm trailing fingertips through surface, face dreamy
